positive: Stylized minimalist design of a crescent moon embracing a stylized single star, rendered in bold, geometric lines. The composition should be perfectly centered, using negative space effectively. The aesthetic is inspired by Art Deco and modern tattoo flash, featuring high contrast black lines on a solid white background. Use a limited color palette: midnight blue, crisp white, and gold foil accents. Flat vector graphic style, suitable for screen printing, clean silhouette, symmetrical composition, high resolution, crisp edges.
